text.message: Looks like blue is my enemy
Oj with the best setup here
He is stealing from me for no reaason
U want to win or revenge
Black why u don’t move the knight
We need to trade each other to devs
Black what do u need to devs?
Keep your brick I'll take it
Let's see if you can when I'll block your wood
I think it’s gg for Oj now
So next turn unless I get road
Red you can't keep up with road
U see that I give u road
